title: OpenSkyData Attack Event
description: A single aerial attack event, typically one night's drone/missile campaign. May contain multiple waves.

id.description: Unique event ID. Format: {conflict}_{YYYYMMDD}_{seq}. e.g. UA_20250907_001

conflict.description: Which conflict this event belongs to

date.description: Date of attack (YYYY-MM-DD). For overnight attacks, use the date the attack began.

time_start.description: Approximate start time in UTC if known (HH:MM). Null if unknown.

time_end.description: Approximate end time in UTC if known. Null if unknown.

duration_hours.description: Approximate duration in hours. Null if unknown.

attack_type.description: Whether attack used drones only, missiles only, or a combination

totals.description: Aggregate numbers for the entire event across all waves

launched_total.description: Total aerial threats launched (drones + missiles if combined). Null for records where only rates/percentages are known.

launched_drones.description: Total drones launched (strike + decoy). Null if breakdown unavailable.

launched_drones_strike.description: Strike drones only. Null if breakdown unavailable.

launched_drones_decoy.description: Decoy drones only (Gerbera/Parody types). Null if breakdown unavailable.

launched_missiles_cruise.description: Cruise missiles launched. Null if not applicable or unknown.

launched_missiles_ballistic.description: Ballistic missiles launched. Null if not applicable or unknown.

intercepted_total.description: Total threats intercepted/neutralised by all methods

intercepted_drones.description: Drones specifically intercepted. Null if breakdown unavailable.

hits.description: Threats that reached their targets. Null if unknown.

lost_location.description: Drones that went off radar / crashed / returned to Russia. Null if unknown.

interception_rate.description: Calculated interception rate as decimal (0.0-1.0). Null if insufficient data.

drone_types.description: Breakdown by drone model if known

speed_kmh.description: Approximate speed in km/h for this type if known

name.description: Region/base name. e.g. 'Kursk Oblast', 'Krasnodar Krai', 'Crimea', 'Cape Chabahar'

bearing_deg.description: Approximate bearing FROM launch point TO target area in degrees. Null if unknown.

confidence.description: How sure we are about this launch origin

waves.description: Individual waves within the attack if distinguishable. Empty array if attack was single wave or wave data unavailable.

time_approx.description: Approximate time this wave was detected (HH:MM UTC)

direction.description: Cardinal or intercardinal direction of approach. e.g. 'south', 'southeast'

interception_methods.description: Breakdown of how threats were neutralised if known. All fields null if unavailable.

interceptor_drone.description: Kills by interceptor drones (Sting, Bullet, etc.)

sam_missile.description: Kills by surface-to-air missiles (Patriot, NASAMS, etc.)

anti_aircraft_guns.description: Kills by AAA / mobile fire groups

defence_context.description: Context about the defending side if known

interceptor_drones_deployed.description: Number of interceptor drones launched in response

notes.description: Free text notes about notable aspects of this attack

sources.description: Data provenance. Every record must cite at least one source.

name.description: Source identifier. e.g. 'Ukrainian Air Force', 'Shahed Tracker', 'ISIS Report Jan 2026'

confidence.description: official=government source, verified_osint=cross-checked by multiple OSINT, osint=single OSINT source, news_report=journalist citing unnamed sources, estimate=calculated/derived

fields_sourced.description: Which fields in this record came from this source. e.g. ['totals.launched_total', 'totals.intercepted_total']
